FACTS ABOUT GEORGETOWN

Georgetown, the community in the town of Halton Hills with the population of 42,123, includes a number of small villages or settlements of the Regional Municipality of Halton. ACME offers one-of-a-kind pest control in Georgetown for the best prices in the region. Whether you live near Mountainview Road, Norval or Maple Ave, you can order our pest control Georgetown service. We will send qualified technicians to your house and provide an effective pest control. Our pest control service in Georgetown includes cockroach control, bed bug exterminator, mice control, ant removal, wasps nest removal, as well as termite control. With a set of innovative equipment, professional technicians and efficacious solutions, our pest control service will leave your house completely free of pests. Carpenter bees, carpenter ants, mice, raccoons, termites, and bed bugs are only some of the pests we can remove with our pest control in Georgetown.

  • The town was named after George Kennedy, an entrepreneur who built multiple mills and other businesses in the town.
  • Georgetown is 54 km away from Toronto and 21 km away from Mississauga.
  • Georgetown holds the Downtown Georgetown Farmers Market every season, starting usually from June. There are over 45 vendors and an average of 3,000 and 5,000 shoppers attending the farmers market.

GEORGETOWN PEST CONTROL SERVICES

ANT CONTROL IN GEORGETOWN

With over 100 species of ants in Canada, these pests have become a serious threat to properties across the country, including Georgetown. Once ants establish a colony, it becomes very difficult to completely eliminate them from your house or office. When they find a food source, ants will keep coming back to the same place, no matter how many times you remove them. By following the trace of the first ants, every insect from the colony will know how to get inside your home and the infestation won’t stop until you completely remove all the ants from the colony in or around your house. For that reason, you need a professional ant removal service that will permanently eliminate ants from your property. The first step of ant removal is the identification of the species. In Georgetown, carpenter ants, pavement ants, and pharaoh ants cause the most damage. ACME offers ultra-effective ant removal service that includes the elimination of all the listed species, in addition to a long list of other ant species that may infest your property.

RODENT CONTROL IN GEORGETOWN

When mice and rats find a way to the inside of your property, it will become a mission impossible to get rid of them – until you order our rodent control service in Georgetown. If you let rodents take over your house, you will not only clean the piles of dirt they leave behind; you will also run at risk of getting infected with some of the serious diseases that mice and rats spread, such as Hantavirus, Bubonic Plague, Rat-Bite Fever, and Salmonellosis. Home should be the safest place for you, do not let rodents change that! With ACME rat exterminator, and mice control we will carefully examine your entire property and perform an effective rodent removal in Georgetown. All you need to do is call ACME and order our rodent control service in Georgetown.

COCKROACH CONTROL IN GEORGETOWN

Apart from being disturbing to see, cockroaches can also be dangerous, which makes it an additional reason to order our cockroach treatment. Namely, Cholera, Salmonellosis, and Tuberculosis are only some of the diseases that cockroaches can carry. You will hardly see these insects during the day as they mostly work over night. Therefore, you will probably have an unpleasant meeting with a cockroach when you turn the light on in your kitchen or bathroom at night. Cockroaches mainly target the food at your home but they will also eat packaging, paper, fabrics, plastics, and other material. To stop cockroaches from invading your house and wandering through the walls of your property, you need ACME cockroach treatment in Georgetown. Our technicians will find cockroaches even during the day, hidden in the safest zones of your house with our cockroach control. With our exceptional equipment, we will eliminate every pest from your house in the shortest time period. After our cockroach exterminator in Georgetown, your night walks to the kitchen will not be scary anymore! ACME is the leading provider of pest control services in Georgetown. You can order our pest control anytime and our team of experts will soon be at your property, eliminating all the pests that invade your space.
